question: Return the names of drivers who have driven vehicles with power over 5000.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT driver.Name FROM driver JOIN vehicle_driver ON driver.Driver_ID = vehicle_driver.Driver_ID JOIN vehicle ON vehicle_driver.Vehicle_ID = vehicle.Vehicle_ID WHERE vehicle.Power > 5000;

back_translation.intent: 获取具有超过5000功率车辆的驾驶员的唯一名称列表

semantic.reason: 语义一致，目标是获取具有超过5000功率车辆的驾驶员的名称，与SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、过滤条件和目标列完全匹配。
